'''Gerrick''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] who studied to become a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Gerrick received some form of [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the tie of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. However, Gerrick had knowledge of [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]] and owned a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. During his life, Gerrick encountered an individual who was armed with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] who attacked him at a distance of four meters. Gerrick managed to deflect at least one bolt back at his attacker using his lightsaber and attacked. Gerrick also once met a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] named [[Draughckt]] on [[Seltos]] and encountered him once again a year later.<ref name="RPG2" />
